segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi, Laura. This is I'm calling from the bookstore. Your online order has been filled and we can deliver it to your dormitory free of charge. That was fast. I'm meeting a friend at the cafe nearby, so I might as well just swing by and grab it. Certainly the only thing is we didn't have an item in stock, the red University T shirt in medium. Oh, it was going to be a gift. We do have it enlarge though, or Green in medium is also available. Large should be fine.
